name: 💡 Feature or design proposal
about: Propose a feature, rule, mechanic, or design change

labels: enhancement, design

## The idea
<!-- What do you propose, in one or two sentences? -->

## Problem / motivation
<!-- What does it improve? Engagement, science, performance, fairness, safety? -->

## Which layer(s) does it touch?
<!-- PROTOCOL / RUNTIME / HEREDITY / OBSERVATORY / GOALS / SAFETY / GAMEDESIGN / VISUAL / SYNTHESIS -->

## Sketch of how it could work
<!-- Rules, data flow, UI, anything concrete. -->

## Risks / open questions
<!-- Safety, balance, compute cost, reproducibility. -->
